stemHtml: Around Paris on January 3<sup>rd</sup> at 1800 UTC, the surface temperature, under shelter, is 3°C. The sky is covered by 8 oktas of stratus cloud. QNH is 1033 hPa. If the sky is covered all night, the minimum temperature of the night of January 3<sup>rd</sup> to January 4<sup>th</sup> should be:
